title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Kluwer Tech Solution Limited
body: "Application number 5095  Applicant Wolters Kluwer (UK) Limited objected to the name used by Kluwer Tech Solution Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10 March 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Kluwer Tech Solution Limited is changed to 15565180, LTD.  "
